title: Whimscape yyzsbackpack add-on
description: add-on resource pack for whimscape to add gui for yyzsbackpack
body:
An add-on for [Whimscape resource pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape) to add GUI for [yyz's backpack mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/yyzs-backpack) to have a complete look.

**I'm not associated with either of the original authors, don't ask them for help if something doesn't work with this speific resource pack, chances are they won't be able to help**

For resource pack to work simply copy zip archive to resourcepacks folder in game directory and enable it from the in-game options
